one_time_description: Earnings from investments in Nation business entities (modified equity method) of $25,888,194 plus change in Whachask Trust accounting estimate of $396,324, totalling $26,284,518 in other items outside operations
economic_notes: Nation settled Agricultural Benefits Claim in 2018 receiving $135,972,938 compensation invested through Mikisew Whachask Trust. Land claim settled in 1986 receiving $26,600,000 and 24,000 acres of reserve land across 9 reserves. Oti-Nikan Community Trust established July 8, 2020 for long-term prosperity and IBA/land claim payment management. 13 Government Business Enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including Mikisew Energy Services Group, Mikisew Commercial Trust, and others.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditor could not obtain condensed financial information for subsidiary business entities (GBEs) as Chief and Council instructed management to exclude this from Note 5. 13 Government Business Enterprises accounted for by modified equity method contributing $25,888,194 in earnings. Agricultural Benefits Claim liability of $49,186,470 payable to members from Whachask Trust. Oti-Nikan Community Trust newly established in 2020. Large deferred revenue balance of $12,566,903 mainly from ISC contributions. Statement of financial position shows large non-standard financial assets including $62M investment in Nation business entities, $35M land claims assets, $57M Whachask Trust investments, and $6.3M Oti-Nikan Trust. Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024 as template default.
